member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.Checking.ProxyChecker
member.summary: Validates proxy candidates by attempting real connections through them.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient
member.summary: Continuously discovers, validates, and maintains a pool of working free proxies.

member.name: M:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.#ctor(InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions)
member.summary: Creates a client with ProxyScrape as the default source.

member.name: M:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.#ctor(InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{InfiniteProxy.Sources.IProxySource})
member.summary: Creates a client with custom sources (useful for testing or adding providers).

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.IsRunning
member.summary: Whether the background scanner is running.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.WorkingCount
member.summary: Number of working proxies currently in the pool.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.HasProxies
member.summary: Whether at least one working proxy is currently available.

member.name: E:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.ProxyAdded
member.summary: Raised when a working proxy is added to the pool.

member.name: E:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.ProxyRemoved
member.summary: Raised when a proxy is removed after failing re-validation.

member.name: M:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the 24/7 background scanner and completes once at least one working proxy is available.
member.param: Cancel waiting for the first proxy. The scanner keeps running unless is called.

member.name: M:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.GetProxies(System.Nullable{InfiniteProxy.ProxyType})
member.summary: Returns all working proxies, optionally filtered by type.

member.name: M:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.GetRandom(System.Nullable{InfiniteProxy.ProxyType})
member.summary: Returns a random working proxy, optionally filtered by type.

member.name: M:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.GetFastest(System.Nullable{InfiniteProxy.ProxyType})
member.summary: Returns the fastest working proxy by measured latency, optionally filtered by type.

member.name: M:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyClient.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops the background scanner.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions
member.summary: Configuration for .

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.ProxyTypes
member.summary: Proxy types to fetch and validate. Defaults to HTTP, SOCKS4, and SOCKS5.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.FetchInterval
member.summary: How often to poll sources for updated proxy lists.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.RecheckInterval
member.summary: How often to re-validate proxies already in the pool.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.MaxConcurrentChecks
member.summary: Maximum number of concurrent proxy validation tasks.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.CheckTimeout
member.summary: Timeout for each individual proxy check.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.HttpValidationUrl
member.summary: URL used to validate HTTP proxies. Must respond with HTTP 200.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.SocksValidationHost
member.summary: Host used to validate SOCKS proxies via a CONNECT handshake.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.SocksValidationPort
member.summary: Port used for SOCKS validation CONNECT requests.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.Country
member.summary: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country filter for ProxyScrape, or null for all countries.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.SourceTimeoutMs
member.summary: Maximum proxy timeout reported by ProxyScrape, in milliseconds.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.InfiniteProxyOptions.SourceLimit
member.summary: Maximum proxies to fetch per source request.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.ProxyEndpoint
member.summary: A validated proxy endpoint discovered by the scanner.

member.name: P:InfiniteProxy.ProxyEndpoint.Address
member.summary: Returns the proxy in host:port format.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.ProxyAddedEventArgs
member.summary: Event data when a working proxy is added to the pool.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.ProxyRemovedEventArgs
member.summary: Event data when a proxy is removed from the pool after failing validation.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.ProxyType
member.summary: Supported proxy protocol types.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.Sources.ProxySourceInfo
member.summary: Metadata returned by a proxy source to detect list updates.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.Sources.ProxyCandidate
member.summary: A raw proxy candidate before validation.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.Sources.IProxySource
member.summary: Abstraction for a remote proxy list provider.

member.name: T:InfiniteProxy.Sources.ProxyScrapeSource
member.summary: Fetches free proxy lists from the ProxyScrape public API.
